name: Bizeny Akiko
character: Bizeny彰子（ビゼニー・アキコ）: 備前焼の里・伊部出身の陶芸家の娘。ダークブラウンのお団子ヘア（高めシニヨン）、顎丈のサイドの後れ毛、抹茶色（セージグリーン）の着物にクリーム色の花柄、薄ピンクの頬。穏やかで知的、備前焼への深い愛情。20代前半。
prompt_features: young Japanese-French woman with dark brown hair pulled up in a high bun (topknot) with soft side-swept wispy bangs and loose face-framing strands reaching her jaw, sage green kimono with cream-colored cloud and floral patterns, burnt red obi sash, rosy cheeks, gentle and intellectual expression

normal.description: 通常版 — 着物（デフォルト）

pure.description: ピュア — 緑の雲紋着物・正面向き・清楚な笑顔
pure.prompt_features_override: young Japanese-French woman with dark brown hair neatly pulled up in a high bun with soft bangs, rosy cheeks, high quality

misterius.description: ミステリアス — 紺の花柄着物・肩見せ・備前焼の壺抱え・後ろ振り向き
misterius.prompt_features_override: young Japanese-French woman with dark brown hair in a loose low bun with soft side-swept strands, mysterious alluring smile, rosy cheeks

casual.description: カジュアル — カーディガン姿
casual.prompt_features_override: young Japanese-French woman with dark brown hair in a relaxed low ponytail with soft side-swept wispy bangs and loose face-framing strands, beige knit cardigan over white blouse, taupe straight-leg pants, rosy cheeks, gentle and intellectual expression

corporate.description: ビジネス — スーツ姿
corporate.prompt_features_override: young Japanese-French woman with dark brown hair pulled up in a neat bun with soft side-swept wispy bangs, navy blue business suit with white blouse, rosy cheeks, confident and professional expression

dressup.description: ドレスアップ — エメラルドグリーンドレス
dressup.prompt_features_override: young Japanese-French woman with dark brown hair in an elegant updo with soft side-swept wispy bangs and delicate loose strands, emerald green cocktail dress with matching bolero jacket, rosy cheeks, elegant and graceful expression

armored.description: 鎧 — 備前焼テクスチャの和風鎧＋刀
armored.prompt_features_override: young Japanese-French woman with dark brown hair in a tight battle-ready bun with soft side-swept bangs, wearing dark brown Bizen-ware inspired samurai armor with lamellar chest plate, shoulder guards, forearm guards, shin guards, white obi sash, dark hakama pants, two katanas at waist, tabi sandals, calm but determined expression

punk.description: パンク — パリジェンヌ・パンクストリート
punk.prompt_features_override: young Japanese-French woman with dark brown hair in a low bun with soft side-swept bangs, black beret, studded black leather biker jacket covered in pins and patches, torn black band t-shirt, red plaid mini skirt, torn fishnet stockings, black buckled combat boots, choker necklace, ear piercings, rebellious but gentle expression
